"<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"AND/OR\" style=\"shape=mxgraph.flowchart.decision;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"60\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Development Action: <name>\" style=\"shape=hexagon;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#f0a500;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"200\" height=\"50\" as=\"geometry\" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 50, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Development Action"}, {"xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Assumption: <name>\" style=\"shape=hexagon;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;fillColor=#e8f5e9;strokeColor=#2e7d32;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry x=\"0\" y=\"0\" id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Comment: <name>\" style=\"shape=hexagon;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;fillColor=#fce4ec;strokeColor=#c2185b;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width=\"180\" height=\"50\" as=\"geometry\" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 180, "h": 50, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Comment"}, {"xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Supports\" style=\"edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#006600;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"30\" as=\"sourcePoint\" /><mxPoint x=\"160\" y=\"30\" as=\"targetPoint\" /></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 160, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Rel: Supports"}, {"xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Hinders\" style=\"edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"30\" as=\"sourcePoint\" /><mxPoint x=\"160\" y=\"30\" as=\"targetPoint\" /></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 160, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Rel: Hinders"}, {"xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Contradicts\" style=\"edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#d79b00;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"30\" as=\"sourcePoint\" /><mxPoint x=\"160\" y=\"30\" as=\"targetPoint\" /></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 160, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Rel: Contradicts"}, {"xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Derivation Rule\" style=\"edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontColor=#9673a6;\" /></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 160, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Rel: Derivation Rule"}, {"xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"defines\" style=\"edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#0050ef;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"30\" as=\"sourcePoint\" /><mxPoint x=\"160\" y=\"30\" as=\"targetPoint\" /></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 160, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Rel: defines"}]
